intent: Extend fluid sizing governance to the file list and grid domains and convert fixed visible dimensions there to responsive units.
assumptions: PR2 only covers src/components/files/list and src/components/files/grid.
IntersectionObserver rootMargin is not user-visible and can be explicitly allowed.
Clamp upper bounds preserve current desktop density.
risks: Dense file list visuals need browser verification after CSS changes.
Card hover spacing and menu offsets must keep C-020/C-021 behavior intact.
Preview and remaining dialog domains are follow-up phases.
steps: Implement filelist scope in the sizing checker.
Convert list/grid fixed visible dimensions to clamp/rem.
Mark non-visual observer rootMargin as an explicit exception.
Run filelist sizing check, tests, lint, build, and browser visual verification.
